title: Tools: Giving AI Hands
summary: An LLM alone can only produce text - it cannot browse, calculate, or send an email. Tool calling is the loop that lets it act on the world, and it is where AI becomes genuinely useful.

context.headline: A brilliant brain gets hands
context.description: On its own, a language model is a brain in a jar: it can only talk. Tool calling closes the gap - the model requests an action, the app performs it, and the result flows back into the conversation. This simple loop turns a text predictor into something that can actually do things.
context.when: The step from talking to doing
